productDisplayName: Bata Men Mocassino Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Create the right board room impression with this stacked-heeled formal shoe from bata. Bata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this shoe tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this shoe that is as hard wearing as it is stylish, at a reasonable price! Product Details Brown upper with ruffled stitch details at the seams of the toe box Padded inner and tongue and slip on styling Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel that has grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
